action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrnv where stt_rec = @$stt_rec) begin select '' as array$, stt_rec, rtrim(ho_nv) + space(1) + ltrim(ten_nv) as ten, '' as ma_qh, ngay_sinh, rtrim(dia_chi_th_tru_so) as dia_chi_th_tru_so, rtrim(dia_chi_th_tru_tinh) as dia_chi_th_tru_tinh, rtrim(dia_chi_th_tru_quan) as dia_chi_th_tru_quan, rtrim(dia_chi_th_tru_xa) as dia_chi_th_tru_xa, rtrim(dien_thoai_dd) + case when dien_thoai_nha = '' then '' else case when dien_thoai_dd <> '' then ' - ' else '' end end + ltrim(dien_thoai_nha) as dien_thoai, gioi_tinh, rtrim(cmnd_so) as cmnd_so, rtrim(que_quan_tinh) as que_quan_tinh, rtrim(que_quan_quan) as que_quan_quan, rtrim(que_quan_xa) as que_quan_xa from hrnv with (nolock) where stt_rec = @$stt_rec union all select '', '', rtrim(ho_ten), rtrim(ma_qh), ngay_sinh, rtrim(dia_chi), '', '', '', '', 1, '', '', '', '' from hregd where stt_rec = @$stt_rec return end

if exists(select 1 from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select rtrim(dia_chi_th_tru_so) as dia_chi_th_tru_so, rtrim(dia_chi_th_tru_tinh) as dia_chi_th_tru_tinh, rtrim(dia_chi_th_tru_quan) as dia_chi_th_tru_quan, rtrim(dia_chi_th_tru_xa) as dia_chi_th_tru_xa, rtrim(dien_thoai_dd) + case when dien_thoai_nha = '' then '' else case when dien_thoai_dd <> '' then ' - ' else '' end end + ltrim(dien_thoai_nha) as dien_thoai, gioi_tinh from hrnv with (nolock) where stt_rec = @stt_rec return end

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@table a where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause

title.v: Lấy số liệu từ thông tin nhân viên$$90
